name: base/structure
description: Structural quality rules — common UX patterns detectable from component contracts

rules.description: Modal component should accept an "onClose" or "onOpenChange" callback for dismissal.
rules.fixHint: Add an "onClose" callback prop to handle dismissal (ESC key, backdrop click).

rules.description: Table component should accept a "columns" prop to define column structure.
rules.fixHint: Accept a "columns" prop with column definitions (key, header, render).

rules.description: Slider component should define min and max props for bounded input.
rules.fixHint: Add "min" and "max" props to define the allowed range.

rules.description: Progress component should accept a "value" prop to display progress.
rules.fixHint: Add a "value" prop (0-100) to indicate progress.

rules.description: Form component should accept an "onSubmit" callback prop.
rules.fixHint: Add an "onSubmit" callback to handle form submission.
